name: Jill
text: Very friendly and helpful. The tiny home was very cozy. After busy days on the beach and exploring, it was a quiet and peaceful place to go back and relax. The outdoor shower was amazing!!

name: Krystalyn
text: The cottage is beautifully decorated and very peaceful. It’s a hidden gem in a busy place. Very quiet and lots of activities provided at the cottage. One of my favorite things at this place was the outdoor shower ❤️.

name: Madison
text: Places like this are why airbnb exists. This tiny home is unique in the way that you get to spend so much time with the person you are with and the home came with so many amenities. Board games, snacks, a fire pit. I highly recommend this place to two people looking to spend time together.

name: Miranda
text: We love staying in this tiny home! It was perfect for our little weekend getaway. Very conveniently located to a lot of things and only a small drive to get to other great towns around. Thank you so much Cassandra for great hospitality!
